final:
module RefModule (
    input wire [15:0] data_in,
    input wire [3:0] address,
    input wire write_enable,
    output reg [15:0] data_out
);
    reg [15:0] unused_memory [0:15]; // 16x16-bit unused_memory

    always @(*) begin
        if (write_enable) begin
            unused_memory[address] <= data_in; // Write data to unused_memory
        end
        data_out = unused_memory[address]; // Read data from unused_memory
    end
endmodule
